name: Restorative Body Scan
tagline: A gentle body scan meditation focused on physical relaxation and releasing accumulated tension.

instructions.text: Settle into a comfortable position and close your eyes.
Take a deep, slow breath in... and exhale completely.
Bring your awareness to your feet. Feel them soften.
Scan up to your legs. Release any tension you find.
Let the relaxation flow into your torso and shoulders.
Breathe into any remaining areas of tightness.
Continue scanning slowly, all the way to the crown of your head.
Gently begin to bring your awareness back to the room.

name: Compassion & Connection
tagline: A meditation focused on fostering empathy and non-judgmental awareness of yourself and others.

instructions.text: Place a hand over your heart and feel its steady rhythm.
Acknowledge the effort you've put in today.
Visualize someone you care about. Wish them well.
Now, visualize someone you find difficult. Wish them peace.
Recognize that everyone, like you, is doing their best.
Let go of judgment and breathe in kindness.
Carry this sense of connection with you as you finish.

name: Present-Moment Awareness
tagline: A grounded awareness practice to separate from self-critical thoughts and acknowledge small wins.

instructions.text: Notice three things you can hear right now.
Notice the feeling of the air against your skin.
If a self-critical thought arises, label it as 'just a thought'.
Think of one small thing you accomplished today.
Let that sense of accomplishment fill your awareness.
Stay present with your breath. You are here. You are enough.
Slowly open your eyes when you're ready.

name: Daily Mindfulness Reset
tagline: A focused 10-minute session to center your awareness and reduce overall stress.

instructions.text: Sit tall and take a deep, centering breath.
Focus your attention on the tip of your nose.
Breathe in naturally... Breathe out naturally.
When your mind wanders, gently bring it back to the breath.
Rest in the stillness between each breath.
Prepare to transition back to your day with clarity.
